headline: Camzyos Adolescent Trial Success Might Change The Case For Investing In Bristol-Myers Squibb (BMY)
summary: Bristol Myers Squibb recently reported that its Phase 3 SCOUT-HCM trial of Camzyos in adolescents with symptomatic obstructive hypertrophic cardiomyopathy met its primary endpoint, showing a clinically meaningful Valsalva LVOT gradient reduction versus placebo with a similar safety profile to adults. The trial’s statistically robust efficacy results and absence of new safety signals highlight Camzyos’ potential to extend into younger patients and broaden Bristol Myers Squibb’s cardiovascular...
